curation_notes: The patch commit is a merge (0.31.0.0 release tag) with 300 files changed across many features. The XSS fix is within the blog module: the Categories controller tightened input validation regex from /^[^<>{}]*$/u to /^[^<>{}=]+$/u and improved seflink validation. The public-facing blog list view rendered category titles via $category->title without esc() output encoding. Locations were derived from the advisory description (blog category creation/editing) cross-referenced with the patch diff showing changes to the Categories controller and blog view templates.
